value.rationale: The fetched page is documentation about "Hooks" in the Antigravity IDE — a system for running custom scripts at specific points during execution. It covers hook configuration, supported events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreInvocation, PostInvocation, Stop), and their input/output contracts. There is no mention anywhere on the page of "prompt-injection protection" or defenses against malicious instructions in tool or web content. The page does not substantiate the claim.
